home.heroLead: A bilingual Vietnamese English legal knowledge base, providing a clear and systematic overview of Vietnam's Constitution, courts, litigation procedures and legal system.

updates.title: Recent Vietnamese legal instruments
updates.lead: Updates on newly issued legal instruments in Vietnam, including ordinances, laws, codes, decrees, circulars, resolutions, decisions, directives, official letters and technical regulations.
updates.attribution: Document titles are provided for reference and search purposes. The English version is for title identification only, and is not an official translation or content summary.

footer.disclaimer: The information on this website is provided for reference purposes only, does not constitute legal advice, and does not create an attorney client relationship.

blog.title: Editorial blog
blog.lead: Legal commentary, case analysis, practice updates and policy notes on Vietnam's legal system, prepared by the Apolo Editorial Team.
blog.noResults: No posts match the current filter.

timeline.title: Eight decades of Vietnamese codification
timeline.lead: From the 1946 Constitution to the 2026 Personal Data Protection Law — the spine of modern Vietnamese statute, milestone by milestone.

trustedSources.caption: Drawn from primary sources
trustedSources.subcaption: Every entry traces back to an authoritative state portal.

recentUpdates.title: What was issued this quarter
recentUpdates.lead: The newest Vietnamese laws, decrees, circulars, and resolutions — titles reproduced verbatim from the official Cổng VBPL (vbpl.vn).
